name: TouHou Music Recording
short_description: Another incident hit Gensokyo,in totally SILENCE. This time, Hieda no Akyuu- the girl buried in Gensokyo Chronicles, now was pulled up to fix the history on her own! "TouHou Music Recording" is dedicated to all Touhou Music lovers. Be prepared to start a bizarre journey with Akuu right now.
detailed_description:
"TouHou Music Recording" is a TouHou doujin rhythm game with recording playmode.
Players will play a role in gensokyo, travel across gensokyo, while recording various songs on the way.
In "Free Mode", players can choose songs for free, and enjoy the rhythm.
In "Travel Mosde", players can unlock songs, read mainline stories and challenge themselves.
In "My Album", players can import their own songs and charts with customized skins.
Follow the rhythm of music, press your keyboard and enjoy the fun of recording !

In the game, we have multiple playscenes, they correspond to different music vehicles and genre.
Plate mode: 5k with arc tracks. The genre is orchestra and piano.
Tape mode: 4k with overlapped tracks. The genre is 8-bit, EDM and metal.
Music box mode: 6k with circle tracks. The genre is music box genre.

Our game community QQ: 1061159117
